---
pagetitle: "Co-Labs"
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: ""
---

```{=html}
<style>
.hero-section {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 100%);
  padding: 3rem 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px;
}
.hero-section h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.15rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 0.5rem; }
.hero-tagline { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #64748b; max-width: 600px; margin: 1rem auto 0; }
.hero-cta {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
  padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem;
  background: #2563EB;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.hero-cta:hover { background: #1d4ed8; color: white; }

.content-section { max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }

.how-it-works {
  display: flex; gap: 2rem; margin: 1.5rem 0 2.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center;
}
.how-step {
  text-align: center; flex: 1; min-width: 180px; max-width: 250px;
}
.how-step .step-num {
  width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: #2563EB; color: white; font-weight: 700;
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.how-step h4 { margin: 0.25rem 0; font-size: 0.95rem; }
.how-step p { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0; }

.vol-header {
  font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 2.5rem 0 0.5rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.vol-header span { font-weight: 400; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-left: 0.5rem; }

.lab-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem;
}
.lab-card {
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  background: white;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  display: block;
}
.lab-card:hover {
  border-color: #2563EB;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1);
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}
.lab-num {
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #94a3b8;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}
.lab-title {
  font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a;
  margin: 0.2rem 0 0.4rem; line-height: 1.3;
}
.lab-desc {
  font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0;
}
.lab-meta {
  display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.72rem; color: #94a3b8;
}
.lab-badge {
  display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 12px; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600;
  background: #eff6ff; color: #2563EB;
}

.ledger-section {
  background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0;
}
.ledger-section h3 { margin-top: 0; font-size: 1.05rem; }

.install-section {
  background: #0f172a; color: #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0;
}
.install-section h3 { color: white; margin-top: 0; font-size: 1.05rem; }
.install-section code {
  background: #1e293b; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #93c5fd;
}
.install-section pre {
  background: #1e293b; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px;
  margin: 0.75rem 0; overflow-x: auto;
}
.install-section pre code { padding: 0; background: none; }
</style>

<div class="hero-section">
  <h1>Co-Labs</h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">See ML Systems in Action</p>
  <p class="hero-tagline">33 interactive labs powered by MLSys·IM. Click a lab below — it runs in your browser. No installation required.</p>
  <a href="#volume-i" class="hero-cta">Browse Labs ↓</a>
</div>

<div class="content-section">

<div class="how-it-works">
  <div class="how-step">
    <div class="step-num">1</div>
    <h4>Click a Lab</h4>
    <p>Choose from 33 labs across two volumes</p>
  </div>
  <div class="how-step">
    <div class="step-num">2</div>
    <h4>It Runs in Your Browser</h4>
    <p>Powered by Marimo + WebAssembly — zero setup</p>
  </div>
  <div class="how-step">
    <div class="step-num">3</div>
    <h4>Your Progress Saves</h4>
    <p>The Design Ledger tracks your decisions across all labs</p>
  </div>
</div>

<h2 id="volume-i" class="vol-header">Volume I: Foundations <span>16 labs · Single-machine ML systems</span></h2>

<div class="lab-grid">

<a href="vol1/lab_00_introduction/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Orientation</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Architect's Portal</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">UI orientation, Design Ledger setup, deployment context selection.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~15 min</span><span class="lab-badge">Start Here</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_01_ml_intro/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 01</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Magnitude Awakening</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">The D·A·M Triad and the 9-order-of-magnitude gap between H100 and Cortex-M7.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_02_ml_systems/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 02</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Iron Law</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Physics of performance: T = D/BW + O/R + L applied to real hardware.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_03_ml_workflow/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 03</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Silent Degradation Loop</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">MLOps feedback loops and iteration velocity tradeoffs.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_04_data_engr/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 04</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Data Gravity Trap</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Pipeline bottlenecks where data volume dominates compute cost.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_05_nn_compute/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 05</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Activation Tax</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Activation memory cost and the memory hierarchy's impact on neural compute.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_06_nn_arch/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 06</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Quadratic Wall</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Transformer attention's O(n²) cost and architectural bottlenecks.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_07_ml_frameworks/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 07</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Kernel Fusion Dividend</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Kernel fusion, dispatch overhead, and why frameworks matter.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_08_model_train/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 08</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Training Memory Budget</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Memory = weights + gradients + optimizer + activations. Where does it all go?</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_09_data_selection/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 09</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Data Selection Tradeoff</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Diminishing returns in curriculum learning and selection cost.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_10_model_compress/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 10</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Compression Frontier</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Quantization and pruning Pareto frontier — accuracy vs. efficiency.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_11_hw_accel/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 11</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Roofline</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Roofline model, ridge point, and MFU — the memory wall in action.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_12_perf_bench/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 12</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Speedup Ceiling</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Amdahl's Law, benchmark validity, and the limits of parallelism.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_13_model_serving/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 13</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Tail Latency Trap</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Little's Law, P99 vs average latency, and the batching paradox.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_14_ml_ops/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 14</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Silent Degradation Problem</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Drift detection, retraining cost, and when models silently fail.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_15_responsible_engr/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 15</div>
  <div class="lab-title">There Is No Free Fairness</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">The fairness-accuracy tradeoff — quantifying the cost of responsible design.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol1/lab_16_ml_conclusion/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 16</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Architect's Audit</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Full Design Ledger review — synthesize decisions across all Volume I labs.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~40 min</span><span class="lab-badge">Capstone</span></div>
</a>

</div>

<h2 class="vol-header">Volume II: At Scale <span>17 labs · Distributed ML systems</span></h2>

<div class="lab-grid">

<a href="vol2/lab_01_introduction/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 01</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Scale Illusion</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">1000× hardware ≠ 1000× speedup. Scale laws from single node to fleet.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_02_compute_infra/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 02</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Interconnect Wall</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">NVLink vs PCIe — where the interconnect becomes the bottleneck.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_03_network_fabrics/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 03</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Bisection Bandwidth Wall</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Fat-tree topologies and why network fabric design matters at scale.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_04_data_storage/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 04</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Data Gravity Trap — Distributed</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">I/O bottlenecks when data and compute are separated across machines.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_05_dist_train/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 05</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Parallelism Paradox</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Data parallel vs 3D parallel — choosing the right parallelism strategy.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_06_collective_comms/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 06</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Bandwidth Invariant</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">AllReduce, ring vs tree — collective communication costs at scale.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_07_fault_tolerance/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 07</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Checkpoint Reckoning</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Young-Daly optimal checkpointing — the physics of fault tolerance.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_08_fleet_orch/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 08</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Utilization Trap</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">GPU utilization vs queue latency — the scheduling paradox.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_09_perf_engr/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 09</div>
  <div class="lab-title">Profile-Guided Optimization</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">You can't optimize what you can't measure — performance engineering.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_10_dist_inference/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 10</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The KV-Cache Memory Wall</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">KV-cache memory scaling, continuous batching, and inference at scale.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_11_edge_intelligence/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 11</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Federation Paradox</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Federated learning communication costs vs privacy guarantees.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_12_ops_scale/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 12</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The SLO Composition Trap</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">SLO budget allocation and cascading failure in multi-service systems.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_13_security_privacy/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 13</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Privacy Measurement Gap</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Differential privacy ε-δ tradeoff — quantifying the cost of privacy.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_14_robust_ai/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 14</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Adversarial Wall</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Adversarial robustness vs accuracy — the robustness tax.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_15_sustainable_ai/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 15</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Jevons Reckoning</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Carbon-aware scheduling and Jevons paradox in AI sustainability.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_16_responsible_ai/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 16</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Fairness Impossibility</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Fairness metrics incompatibility at scale — why you can't have it all.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~35 min</span></div>
</a>

<a href="vol2/lab_17_ml_conclusion/" class="lab-card">
  <div class="lab-num">Lab 17</div>
  <div class="lab-title">The Constraints Never Lie</div>
  <p class="lab-desc">Full Vol I + Vol II synthesis — the 22-wall audit across both volumes.</p>
  <div class="lab-meta"><span>~45 min</span><span class="lab-badge">Capstone</span></div>
</a>

</div>

<div class="ledger-section">
  <h3>The Design Ledger</h3>
  <p>Every lab asks you to make predictions and design decisions. The <strong>Design Ledger</strong> saves your choices in your browser and carries them across all 33 labs — from Lab 00 through the final capstone. Lab 08's training memory budget builds on Lab 05's activation analysis, which builds on Lab 01's magnitude calibration.</p>
  <p>Your ledger is personal. It lives in your browser's localStorage. If you switch devices, you can export and import it.</p>
</div>

<div class="install-section">
  <h3>Advanced: Run Locally</h3>
  <p>For the full experience with MLSys·IM's physics engine, run labs locally:</p>
  <pre><code>pip install mlsysim[labs]
git clone https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book.git
cd cs249r_book/labs
marimo run vol1/lab_01_ml_intro.py</code></pre>
</div>

<p style="text-align: center; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-top: 2rem;">
  Part of the <a href="../book/">Machine Learning Systems</a> textbook.
  <br/>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions">Share feedback</a> · <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book">View source</a>
</p>

</div>
```
